title: Hopenity Consumer Health Data Policy
introduction: This Hopenity Consumer Health Data Privacy Policy supplements the Hopenity Privacy Policy and applies to the Services, as defined therein. The Services are operated by Hopenity USDS JointVenture LLC ('we' or 'us'). We are committed to protecting the privacy of consumer health data.

sections.title: Information We Collect
sections.content: We may collect information from and about you, including information that you provide, automatically collected information, and information from other sources. If you choose to engage in public activities on the Services, you should be aware that any information you share may be read, collected, or used by other users and the public.

subsections.heading: Information You Provide
subsections.content: The scope of consumer health data is defined differently under different laws. For your information and awareness, we may collect the following information depending on your settings and how you use the Services:
bullets: Video and audio content you create, upload, or share that may contain health information
Comments, captions, and descriptions related to your videos
Messages and communications with other users
Information you provide when setting up your profile or account
Information about your interactions with health-related content

subsections.heading: Automatically Collected Information
subsections.content: We automatically collect certain information about your device and how you use the Services:
bullets: Device identifiers and settings
Information about your interactions with the Services
Content preferences and viewing history
Location information (if you grant permission)
Analytics related to health-related content consumption

sections.title: How We Use Your Information
sections.content: We use consumer health data for various purposes to provide and improve our Services. The legal basis for processing your consumer health data varies depending on your jurisdiction and the specific use case.

subsections.heading: Primary Purposes
subsections.content: We may use your consumer health data to:
bullets: Provide and maintain the Services
Personalize your experience and recommendations
Improve our Services and develop new features
Ensure safety and security of the platform
Comply with applicable laws and regulations
Communicate with you about your account and the Services

subsections.heading: Analytics and Research
subsections.content: We may use aggregated and de-identified consumer health data for research, analytics, and improving our Services.
bullets: Understanding trends in health content consumption
Improving content recommendations
Developing better safety and moderation tools
Research to enhance user experience

sections.title: How We Share Your Information
sections.content: We are committed to limiting the sharing of your consumer health data. In most cases, we do not share consumer health data with third parties without your explicit consent, except as described below.

subsections.heading: Service Providers
subsections.content: We may share consumer health data with service providers who assist us in providing the Services:
bullets: Cloud infrastructure providers
Analytics vendors
Customer support providers
Payment processors
Security and compliance partners

subsections.heading: Legal Requirements
subsections.content: We may disclose your consumer health data when required by law or in response to valid legal processes:
bullets: Responses to government requests
Protection of legal rights and safety
Prevention of fraud or abuse
Compliance with applicable laws

sections.title: Your Rights and Choices
sections.content: Depending on your jurisdiction, you may have certain rights regarding your consumer health data. We respect your privacy rights and provide mechanisms to exercise them.

subsections.heading: Access and Portability
subsections.content: You have the right to access the consumer health data we hold about you and request a portable copy of your data in a commonly used format.
bullets: Request your personal data at any time
Receive data in a machine-readable format
Transfer your data to other services
Understand what data we collect and why

subsections.heading: Correction and Deletion
subsections.content: You have the right to correct inaccurate data and request deletion of your consumer health data.
bullets: Correct inaccurate or incomplete information
Request deletion of your account and associated data
Delete specific content you've shared
Opt-out of certain data uses

subsections.heading: Opt-Out Rights
subsections.content: You may have the right to opt out of certain uses of your consumer health data:
bullets: Opt out of targeted advertising
Opt out of data sales (if applicable)
Control visibility of health-related content
Manage notification preferences

sections.title: Privacy Policy Updates
sections.content: We may update this policy periodically as our products and services evolve. We encourage you to review this policy regularly to stay informed about how we protect your consumer health data.

subsections.heading: Changes to This Policy
subsections.content: We will notify you of any material changes to this policy by posting the updated policy and updating the 'Last Updated' date.
bullets: Material changes will be highlighted
Continued use constitutes acceptance of changes
Your rights remain protected under applicable laws
You may contact us with questions about updates

sections.title: Data Security and Retention
sections.content: We take reasonable technical, administrative, and physical safeguards to protect consumer health data. We also retain data only as long as necessary for the purposes described in this policy and as required by law.

subsections.heading: Security Measures
subsections.content: We use industry-standard controls to protect data, including encryption, access controls, and monitoring.
bullets: Encryption of data in transit and at rest
Access controls and least-privilege for internal systems
Regular security audits and vulnerability scanning
Incident response procedures

subsections.heading: Data Retention
subsections.content: We retain consumer health data for as long as necessary to provide the Services, comply with legal obligations, resolve disputes, and enforce agreements.
bullets: Retention periods vary by data type and purpose
We delete or de-identify data when no longer needed
You can request deletion as described in the 'Your Rights and Choices' section

sections.title: Children and Teens
sections.content: Our Services are not intended for children under applicable minimum ages. We do not knowingly collect consumer health data from children without parental consent.

subsections.heading: Age Restrictions
subsections.content: If you are a parent or guardian and believe we have collected personal data from a child without consent, contact us to request deletion.
bullets: Parents can request removal of their child's data
We follow applicable laws for child data protections

sections.title: Other Rights
sections.content: Some jurisdictions provide additional rights related to consumer health data. These may include restrictions on automated decision-making, additional consent requirements, or supplemental remedies.

subsections.heading: State and Local Rights
subsections.content: Depending on where you live, you may have extra rights under local laws.
bullets: Examples include the right to limit certain processing in specific states
Contact us for details about rights in your jurisdiction

sections.title: Contact Us
sections.content: If you have questions about this policy, want to exercise your rights, or need support, contact us using the methods below. loIf you have questions about this policy, want to exercise your rights, or need support, contact us using the methods below. We may collect information from and about you, including information that you provide, automatically collected information, and information from other sources. If you choose to engage in public activities on the Services, you should be aware that any information you share may be read, collected, or used by other users and the public.

subsections.heading: How to Reach Us
subsections.content: You can contact our privacy team by email, post, or through the app's support channels.
bullets: Email: privacy@hopenity.example
Mail: Hopenity USDS JointVenture LLC, Attn: Privacy, 123 Example St, City, State
In-app support and help center
